text.title: Claude Tool Use Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to build a production Claude tool-use loop.

step.name: design-tool-schemas
step.input: Use-case + list of functions Claude should call.
step.action: For each tool, write name + ≥30-char description + input_schema (≤2 levels deep). Validate against templates/tool-definition.json shape.
step.decision-gate: If N > 20, introduce a meta-tool selector (Claude picks a category, runtime narrows the set).

step.name: write-executor
step.action: Implement `execute(name, input) -> str`. Catch exceptions; return error message as string (not is_error=True unless terminal).
step.decision-gate: Unit-test each tool with sample inputs before wiring into the loop.

step.name: write-agent-loop
step.action: Implement loop per templates/agent-loop.py: send messages, check stop_reason, dispatch parallel tool_use blocks via ThreadPoolExecutor, append results.

step.name: set-max-turns
step.action: Cap iterations at 10-20 (typical default 15). Log a warning on cap-hit and return a partial-result message.
step.decision-gate: Test by feeding a deliberately-looping tool; verify the cap fires.

step.name: handle-errors
step.action: Return tool errors as content for recoverable errors (timeout, not-found); use `is_error=True` only when the error must terminate (auth fail, schema violation).
step.decision-gate: Sample 5 error cases; verify Claude recovers on at least 4.

step.name: add-forced-tool-extraction
step.input: Use case requiring typed JSON output.
step.action: Define an extraction tool (description = "Return the structured result"); call with `tool_choice={"type":"tool","name":"extract"}`; read `tool_use.input` for the typed JSON.
step.decision-gate: Validate the returned JSON against the application schema before consuming.
